dataset: Single-cell RNA sequencing reveals cellular and molecular heterogeneity in fibrocartilaginous enthesis formation
scope_note: Shoulder-region enthesis developmental single-cell example; not a frozen-shoulder or shoulder periarthritis case-control cohort.
pipeline: Seurat V5, SingleR, marker-support scoring, cluster marker detection, GO/KEGG enrichment, CellChat, and Monocle3
